Frequently Asked Question about AMD to USD 1 Armenian Dram = 0.002653 US Dollars as of February 13, 2026 07:55 PM UTC. You can get live exchange rates between Armenian Drams and US Dollars using exchange-rates.org, which aggregates real-time forex data from the most authoritative sources. As of February 13, 2026 07:55 PM UTC, 100 Armenian Drams is equivalent to 0.2653 US Dollars. The exchange rate at this time is 0.002653 US Dollars per Armenian Dram. In the last 10 years, the highest rate from Armenian Drams to US Dollars was on February 6, 2026 when each Armenian Dram was worth 0.002658 US Dollars. The AMD and USD can be traded 24x5, starting from the time markets open on Monday mornings in Sydney until they close on Fridays at 5 PM in New York. Exchange rates can fluctuate by the minute while markets are open. However, the period between 3-4 PM GMT is often a good time to convert Armenian Drams to US Dollars because currency market liquidity and trading volume tend to be the highest during this time. Additionally, it's advisable to convert Armenian Drams to US Dollars early in the week if you need USD urgently. Executing a trade late in the week might result in a delayed settlement until the following week, as forex markets are closed on weekends. The US Dollar is currently stronger than the Armenian Dram, as 1 USD is equal to 376.94 AMD. Conversely, 1 AMD is worth 0.002653 USD.
